options.name: Decree of the Heart
options.hint: Defining Pillar: Ab. Favored Attributes: Presence and Strength.

options.name: Decree of the Spirit
options.hint: Defining Pillar: Ba. Favored Attributes: Resolve and Wits.

options.name: Decree of the Essence
options.hint: Defining Pillar: Ka. Favored Attributes: Resolve and Stamina.

options.name: Decree of the Name
options.hint: Defining Pillar: Ren. Favored Attributes: Intelligence and Manipulation.

options.name: Decree of the Shadow
options.hint: Defining Pillar: Sheut. Favored Attributes: Composure and Stamina.

options.name: Maa-Kep
options.description: Engravers of Amulets. Managers and organizers. Favored vessels: amulets.

options.name: Mesen-Nebu
options.description: First Alchemists. Power brokers and sensualists. Favored vessels: regia.

options.name: Sesha-Hebsu
options.description: Inscribers of Texts. Scholars and scribes. Favored vessels: texts.

options.name: Su-Menent
options.description: Shepherds of the Shell. Funerary priests and ritualists. Favored vessels: uter.

options.name: Tef-Aabhi
options.description: Builders of Effigies. Masons and engineers. Favored vessels: effigies.

powers.label: Pillars
powers.description: Distribute 9 dot-points across your five Pillars. Your defining Pillar sets the cap for all others. You may leave only one Pillar unrated. The 5th dot costs 2 points and requires the other four to be rated.

items.name: Sheut
items.description: Shadow — the hidden self, death and time.
